title: Naga dynasty
summary:
Naga dynasty may refer to these dynasties of ancient India:

Nagas of Padmavati, 3rd-4th century in northern India
Nagas of Vidisha, 1st-century BCE in central India
The rulers of the legendary Naga Kingdom
text:
Naga dynasty may refer to these dynasties of ancient India:
